name: rest-storage-passwords-manager
description: React-based Splunk app for managing storage/passwords credentials

scripts.package: find appserver static default -type f | tar -czf rest-storage-passwords-manager.spl -T -
scripts.check:bundle-size: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const size=fs.statSync('appserver/static/react/bundle.js').size; if(size > 2097152){console.error('FAIL: bundle.js ('+size+' bytes) exceeds 2MB limit');process.exit(1)} else {console.log('PASS: bundle.js '+size+' bytes (under 2MB)')}"
scripts.verify:legacy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['appserver/static/password-crud.js','appserver/static/react/bundle.js']; let missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.existsSync(f)); if(missing.length){console.error('MISSING:',missing);process.exit(1)} else console.log('OK: legacy + react bundle both present')"

author: Scott Haskell
